mectronics.description: Participated in the development and maintenance of web applications. Worked with technologies such as React, TypeScript, .NET, and SQL Server. Contributed to implementing new features, fixing bugs, and optimizing processes related to inventory and purchasing.
works: Web and mobile application for inventory management and fleet control
Application for managing judicial processes in concession companies

ambidata-pia.description: Environmental monitoring system using ESP32 to collect temperature and humidity data. Real-time data visualization through web-based charts, focused on crop monitoring.
